description: Verso: Fragment of a dowry list. Location; Cairo. Dating: 1189–1200 CE (8 Sivan 15[..] Seleucid). The recto was reused for piyyuṭ and a year (1511 Seleucid) is mentioned in l. 13, so the verso date range is 8 Sivan 15[00]-15[11] Seleucid (1189-1200 CE). The dowry list was likely recorded toward the latter end of this range (information from Amir Ashur).
description_he: צד ב: קטע מרשימת נדוניה, קהיר. תאריך: 8 בסיוון 15[..] לשטרות = 1189–1200. צד א שימש מחדש לפיוט.
